ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course (e.g., BUS. 100) */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "units" INTEGER /* Number of units the course is worth */,
  "degree_credit" TEXT /* Indicates if the course is degree credit (e.g., Degree Credit) */,
  "grading_type" TEXT /* Grading type (e.g., Letter Grade Only) */,
  "lecture_hours" TEXT /* Number of lecture hours per semester */,
  "homework_hours" TEXT /* Number of homework hours per semester */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "corequisites" TEXT /* Corequisites for the course */,
  "recommended" TEXT /* Recommended preparation for the course */,
  "degree_requirements" TEXT /* Degree requirements the course fulfills */,
  "transfer_credit" TEXT /* Transfer credit information */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed, long-form description of the course */,
  "course_format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., in-person, hybrid, online) */,
  "catalog_link" TEXT /* Link to the course catalog entry */,
  "scheduling_info" TEXT /* Scheduling restrictions or requirements for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the section belongs to */,
  "section_number" TEXT /* Number of the section (e.g., 50045) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the section (e.g., OPEN, OPEN for Waitlist) */,
  "days" TEXT /* Days the section meets (e.g., T) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the section meets (e.g., 9:30am-11:30am) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the section */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* ID of the room where the section meets */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the section */,
  "current_students" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the section */,
  "waitlist_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed on the waitlist */,
  "waitlist_current" INTEGER /* Current number of students on the waitlist */,
  "section_type" TEXT /* Type of section (e.g., lecture, lab, discussion) */,
  "section_capacity_override" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity for the section, if different from the default room capacity */,
  "waitlist_policy" TEXT /* Waitlist policy for the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "department_head" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the instructor is the head of their department */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the room is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the room */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the room (e.g., Available, Not Available) */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., lecture hall, lab, office) */,
  "room_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment available in the room */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the student (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "major_advisor" INTEGER /* ID of the student's major advisor */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor of the student, if applicable */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the section */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the section */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade the student received in the section */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date the student dropped the course, if applicable */,
  "withdraw_date" TEXT /* Date the student withdrew from the course, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student on the waitlist */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the student is waiting for */,
  "waitlist_date" TEXT /* Date the student was added to the waitlist */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the student on the waitlist */,
  "waitlist_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the student on the waitlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has prerequisites */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "prerequisite_type" TEXT /* Type of prerequisite (e.g., course, GPA requirement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corequisites" (
  "corequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has corequisites */,
  "corequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corequisite course */,
  "corequisite_type" TEXT /* Type of corequisite (e.g., course, GPA requirement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corequisites_corequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("corequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommended" (
  "recommended_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommended preparation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has recommended preparation */,
  "recommended_text" TEXT /* Text describing the recommended preparation */,
  "recommended_type" TEXT /* Type of recommended preparation (e.g., course, GPA requirement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommended_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommended_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, faculty, student) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
